{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Heaven’s Torch
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Heaven’s Torch]] is the ultimate source of fire aura.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Heaven’s Torch]] is a natural treasure that looks like a miniature reddish sun.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
